case_title: MIRAH RIBEN VS. WIKPEDIA PUBLISHERS ONLINE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $415.00 FILED BY RIBEN, MIRAH AS TO DEFENDANT WIKPEDIA PUBLISHERS ONLINE AKA DESIGN CO AKA CREATIVE AGENCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS: UNABLE TO LOCATE ADDRESS. NUMBERS ON THE HOMES START AT 3900 THE JUMP TO 3928. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIBEN, MIRAH AS TO DEFENDANT WIKPEDIA PUBLISHERS ONLINE AKA DESIGN CO AKA CREATIVE AGENCY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE.
